name: Mars Barn
description: Collaborative Mars habitat simulation — terrain, atmosphere, solar, thermal modeling

terrain.title: Terrain Generator
terrain.description: Generate Mars terrain heightmaps with craters, ridges, and plains. Output a 2D grid of elevation values.

atmosphere.title: Atmosphere Model
atmosphere.description: Model Mars atmospheric pressure, temperature, and CO2 density at varying altitudes. Thin atmosphere with dust storm events.

solar.title: Solar Irradiance Calculator
solar.description: Calculate solar energy reaching the Mars surface given latitude, season, time of day, and atmospheric conditions from the atmosphere module.

thermal.title: Thermal Regulation System
thermal.description: Model heat flow in/out of the habitat given solar input and atmospheric conditions. Balance heating, insulation, and radiative cooling.

events.title: Event System
events.description: Random event generator for dust storms, meteorite impacts, equipment failures. Each event modifies simulation parameters.

state_serial.title: State Serialization
state_serial.description: Save and load full simulation state to/from JSON. Support snapshots and diffing between timesteps.

validate.title: Validation Suite
validate.description: Cross-check simulation outputs against known Mars data. Validate terrain elevation ranges, atmospheric pressure, solar flux, and thermal bounds.

viz.title: Visualization Module
viz.description: ASCII/text visualization of terrain heightmaps and atmosphere layers. Print-friendly output for discussion posts.
